description_long: This bungalow features a single-story, elongated rectangular layout with a cross-gabled roof, combining two main roof sections at perpendicular angles. The exterior walls are smooth and light-colored, with several rectangular windows distributed asymmetrically along the sides. A covered porch area is visible, supported by posts, providing a sheltered entryway and outdoor space. The front facade includes a prominent garage door and a main entrance, both clearly defined. The roof is pitched and extends over the porch, while the rear and side elevations show additional windows and a secondary door. The overall design is simple and functional, typical of modern suburban bungalows.
description: A single-story, cross-gabled bungalow with a covered porch, garage, and asymmetrical window arrangement. The exterior is light-colored with a pitched roof and modern suburban styling.
description_view_0: Side view showing the long facade, multiple windows, and the covered porch extending from the main structure.
description_view_1: View from the porch side, highlighting the open covered area, supporting posts, and the entryway.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying a secondary door, fewer windows, and the intersection of the two roof sections.
description_view_3: Front view featuring the garage door, main entrance, and a window, with the gabled roof above.
